item.title: MPMA Image Text (Genesis)
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: {"genesis-custom-blocks/mpma-text":{"name":"mpma-text","title":"MPMA Image Text (Genesis)","excluded":[],"icon":"notes","category":{"icon":"admin-customizer","slug":"mpma-custom","title":"MPMA Custom Blocks"},"keywords":[],"fields":{"image":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","name":"image","label":"Image","order":0,"control":"image","type":"integer"},"header":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"Enter Title Here","maxlength":"","name":"header","label":"Header","control":"text","type":"string","order":1},"body":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"Enter Body Paragraph","maxlength":"","name":"body","label":"Body","control":"text","type":"string","order":2},"button-text":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"button-text","label":"Button Text","order":3,"control":"text","type":"string"},"button-url":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","name":"button-url","label":"Button URL","order":4,"control":"url","type":"string"},"image-position":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","options":[{"value":"left: Left","label":"left: Left"},{"value":"right: Right","label":"right: Right"}],"default":"left","name":"image-position","label":"Image Position","order":5,"control":"select","type":"string"}}}}

item.title: MPMA Card
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: {"genesis-custom-blocks/mpma-card":{"name":"mpma-card","title":"MPMA Card","excluded":[],"icon":"insert_photo","category":{"icon":"admin-customizer","slug":"mpma-custom","title":"MPMA Custom Blocks"},"keywords":[],"fields":{"title":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"Title here","maxlength":"","name":"title","label":"Title","control":"text","type":"string","order":0},"title-color":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"var( --color-white)","name":"title-color","label":"Title Color","order":1,"control":"color","type":"string"},"title-font-size":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"title-font-size","label":"Title Font Size","control":"text","type":"string","order":2},"content":{"help":"","name":"content","label":"Content","location":"editor","order":3,"control":"inner_blocks","type":"string"},"button-text":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"button-text","label":"Button Text","control":"text","type":"string","order":4},"link":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","name":"link","label":"Button Link","order":5,"control":"url","type":"string"},"background-image":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","name":"background-image","label":"Background Image","order":6,"control":"image","type":"integer"},"border":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":false,"name":"border","label":"Border","order":7,"control":"toggle","type":"boolean"},"border-radius":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"2px","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"border-radius","label":"Border Radius","control":"text","type":"string","order":8},"border-width":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"border-width","label":"Border Width","control":"text","type":"string","order":9},"border-color":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"var(--color-secondary)","name":"border-color","label":"Border Color","order":10,"control":"color","type":"string"},"background-color":{"location":"editor","width":"100","help":"","default":"var(--color-secondary)","name":"background-color","label":"Background Color","order":11,"control":"color","type":"string"},"title-position":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"Position of title inside or outside the card.","options":[{"value":"outside","label":"Outside"},{"value":"inside","label":"Inside"}],"default":"inside","name":"title-position","label":"Title Position","order":12,"control":"select","type":"string"},"title-alignment":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","options":[{"value":"left","label":"Left"},{"value":"center","label":"Center"},{"value":"right","label":"Right"}],"default":"center","name":"title-alignment","label":"Content Alignment","order":13,"control":"select","type":"string"},"width":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"250px","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"width","label":"Width","control":"text","type":"string","order":14},"height":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"200px","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"height","label":"Height","control":"text","type":"string","order":15},"padding-bottom":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","name":"padding-bottom","label":"Padding Bottom","order":16,"control":"number","type":"integer"},"padding-left":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","name":"padding-left","label":"Padding Left","order":17,"control":"number","type":"integer"},"padding-right":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","name":"padding-right","label":"Padding Right","order":18,"control":"number","type":"integer"},"padding-top":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","name":"padding-top","label":"Padding Top","order":19,"control":"number","type":"integer"},"flippable":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":false,"name":"flippable","label":"Flippable","order":20,"control":"toggle","type":"boolean"},"flip-direction":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","options":[{"value":"left-right","label":"Left to Right"},{"value":"right-left","label":"Right to Left"},{"value":"up-down","label":"Up to Down"},{"value":"down-up","label":"Down to Up"}],"default":"left-right","name":"flip-direction","label":"Flip direction","order":21,"control":"select","type":"string"},"flip-speed":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"Enter time of animation in milliseconds (e.g. 0.8)","default":"0.8","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"flip-speed","label":"Flip Speed","order":22,"control":"text","type":"string"},"flip-card-front-text":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"","placeholder":"","maxlength":"","name":"flip-card-front-text","label":"Flip Card Front Text","control":"text","type":"string","order":23},"flip-card-front-image":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","name":"flip-card-front-image","label":"Flip Card Front Image","order":24,"control":"image","type":"integer"},"flip-card-front-color":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"var(--color-secondary)","name":"flip-card-front-color","label":"Flip Card Front Color","order":25,"control":"color","type":"string"},"flip-card-front-text-color":{"location":"inspector","width":"100","help":"","default":"var(--color-white)","name":"flip-card-front-text-color","label":"Flip Card Front Text Color","order":26,"control":"color","type":"string"}}}}
